workflow_goal: Tune the resistance parameter so the standalone RL step model matches the public current targets.
acceptance: The submission must provide a JSON parameter_set containing the tunable parameter resistance.
The submitted resistance value must stay within the public parameter range.
The tuned model must pass OpenModelica checkModel(model_name).
OpenModelica simulate(model_name) must reach an accepted simulation status with the specified stop_time, intervals, and warning policy.
The current response must satisfy the public target_metrics.
